name: Century Bank Of Florida
description_short: FDIC-insured bank based in Tampa, Florida offering personal and business banking with competitive rates, online access, and loan services.
description_long:
Century Bank of Florida is a traditional community bank headquartered in Tampa, Florida at 716 West Fletcher Avenue. The bank has been serving customers through multiple service channels including in-person banking, phone banking (1-888-245-8991), and digital platforms. As an FDIC-insured institution, deposits are backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government, providing deposit protection up to applicable limits.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of financial services including personal banking, business banking, loan services, and deposit accounts. Their deposit products include Interest Checking Accounts, Money Market Accounts, and other savings vehicles with tiered interest rates based on balance levels. They provide online banking through their "Century Connection" platform, enabling 24/7 account access. The bank also offers competitive loan services described as serving "every part of your changing life," though specific loan products are not detailed on the provided website content.

Century Bank of Florida emphasizes security and customer service, with dedicated online security measures and a customer service center for account support. The bank maintains traditional banking hours with phone support and maintains multiple service channels to accommodate different customer preferences. Their rates page shows deposit accounts effective as of April 1, 2026, with Interest Checking at 0.20% APY across all balance tiers and Money Market Accounts ranging from 0.30% to 0.40% APY depending on balance levels.

As a regional community bank, Century Bank of Florida serves customers seeking FDIC-insured deposit products and traditional banking services in the Florida market. However, the website provides limited detail on specific loan products, business banking features, rates for those services, or competitive advantages beyond general marketing statements. Prospective customers would need to contact the bank directly for comprehensive information on loan terms, business account features, or detailed service comparisons. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Money Market Accounts with tiered rates up to 0.40% APY
Online banking through Century Connection platform
In-person banking at main office and branch locations
pros: FDIC-insured deposits with full U.S. Government backing
24/7 online banking access through Century Connection platform
Multiple service channels: in-person, phone (1-888-245-8991), and digital banking
Tiered Money Market Account rates up to 0.40% APY on balances of $500,000+
Dedicated online security measures and privacy protections
Business banking and loan services available alongside personal accounts
Main office located in Tampa with accessible customer service center
cons: Deposit rates are relatively low (0.20% checking, max 0.40% money market) compared to online banks and high-yield savings options
Website provides minimal detail on specific loan products, terms, APRs, or eligibility requirements
Limited information about business banking features, products, or competitive advantages
No details provided on fee structures, minimum balance requirements, or account maintenance costs
Regional Florida-based bank with no clear indication of service availability outside Florida or digital-only account opening capabilities
best_for: Florida-based customers seeking FDIC-insured traditional banking with in-person branch access
Business owners in the Tampa area looking for comprehensive business banking and lending relationships
Depositors prioritizing security and regulatory protection over competitive interest rates
diagnosis: Century Bank of Florida is best for Florida-based customers who value FDIC-insured deposits and traditional banking relationships over online convenience and competitive rates. The main caveat is that deposit rates are significantly lower than national online banks and high-yield savings alternatives, and the website lacks transparency on loan products, fees, and specific business banking offerings—requiring direct contact with the bank for comprehensive service details.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
